metadataRefresh.datasetDiscoveryTooltip: How often Dremio will scan Kafka for new topics

elements.label: Bootstrap Servers
elements.tooltip: Comma-separated list of Kafka broker addresses (host:port)
elements.errMsg: At least one bootstrap server is required

elements.label: Schema Mode
elements.tooltip: RAW: expose only metadata columns + _value_raw. JSON: additionally infer top-level field types by sampling recent messages.

elements.label: Schema Sample Records
elements.tooltip: Number of recent messages to sample per partition for JSON schema inference. Default: 100.

elements.label: Schema Registry URL
elements.tooltip: Confluent-compatible Schema Registry URL. Supports http:// and https://. Required when Schema Mode is AVRO. Leave blank for RAW or JSON modes.

elements.label: Schema Registry Username
elements.tooltip: Username for HTTP Basic authentication against the Schema Registry. For Confluent Cloud, use the Schema Registry API key. Leave blank for unauthenticated registries.

elements.label: Schema Registry Password
elements.tooltip: Password for Schema Registry Basic authentication. For Confluent Cloud, use the Schema Registry API secret.

elements.label: Disable Schema Registry SSL Hostname Verification
elements.tooltip: Disable TLS certificate and hostname verification for Schema Registry HTTPS connections. Use only for self-signed certificates in non-production environments.

elements.label: Default Max Records Per Partition
elements.tooltip: Maximum records to return per partition in a plain SELECT * scan. Seeks to (latestOffset - N) to bound scans on high-volume topics. Set to 0 to read from the earliest offset. Default: 10000.

elements.label: Topic Exclude Pattern (regex)
elements.tooltip: Java regex for topics to hide from Dremio. Default: '^__' hides all internal Kafka topics. Example: '^(__|\.confluent)' to also hide Confluent internal topics.

elements.label: Topic Include Pattern (regex)
elements.tooltip: Optional Java regex. When set, only matching topics appear in Dremio. Example: '^(orders|customers)' to show only specific topics.

elements.label: Security Protocol
elements.tooltip: Kafka security protocol: PLAINTEXT (no auth/encryption), SSL (TLS only), SASL_PLAINTEXT (SASL, no TLS), SASL_SSL (SASL + TLS, recommended for production).

elements.label: SASL Mechanism
elements.tooltip: SASL authentication mechanism. Required when Security Protocol is SASL_PLAINTEXT or SASL_SSL.

elements.label: SASL Username
elements.tooltip: SASL username for PLAIN or SCRAM authentication.

elements.label: SASL Password
elements.tooltip: SASL password for PLAIN or SCRAM authentication.

elements.label: SSL Truststore Path
elements.tooltip: Path to a JKS or PKCS12 truststore used to verify the Kafka broker certificate. Leave blank to use the JVM default trust store.

elements.label: SSL Truststore Password
elements.tooltip: Password for the truststore file.

elements.label: SSL Truststore Type
elements.tooltip: Truststore file format: JKS or PKCS12. Default: JKS.

elements.label: SSL Keystore Path
elements.tooltip: Path to a JKS or PKCS12 keystore containing the client private key and certificate. Only required for mutual TLS (mTLS) where the broker demands client authentication.

elements.label: SSL Keystore Password
elements.tooltip: Password for the keystore file.

elements.label: SSL Keystore Type
elements.tooltip: Keystore file format: JKS or PKCS12. Default: JKS.

elements.label: Disable SSL Hostname Verification
elements.tooltip: Disable TLS hostname verification. Useful for self-signed certificates where the CN/SAN does not match the broker hostname. Do not enable in production.

elements.label: Max Poll Records
elements.tooltip: Maximum number of records per Kafka consumer poll() call. Controls memory vs. throughput. Default: 500.

elements.label: Request Timeout (ms)
elements.tooltip: Kafka consumer request timeout in milliseconds. Default: 30000.

elements.label: Metadata Cache TTL (seconds)
elements.tooltip: How long to cache topic schemas and partition metadata locally. Default: 60 seconds. Set to 0 to always fetch fresh.
